name: terminal-finder
title: Terminal Finder
description: Navigate between Finder and WezTerm or Ghostty
author: sayori

commands.name: finder-to-wezterm
commands.title: Finder → WezTerm
commands.description: Open current Finder directory in WezTerm

commands.name: finder-to-ghostty
commands.title: Finder → Ghostty
commands.description: Open current Finder directory in Ghostty

commands.name: wezterm-to-finder
commands.title: WezTerm → Finder
commands.description: Open current WezTerm directory in Finder

commands.name: ghostty-to-finder
commands.title: Ghostty → Finder
commands.description: Open current Ghostty directory in Finder
